name: ash-stock
description: Server-backed Indian NSE stock selection engine with Upstox historical candles, MongoDB persistence, and Q1 Render runner.

scripts.guard: node scripts/ashstocks-execution-guard.mjs && node scripts/ashstocks-terminal-guard.mjs && node scripts/ashstocks-paper-lifecycle-guard.mjs && node scripts/ashstocks-upstox-parameter-bridge-guard.mjs
scripts.check: npm run guard && node --check server.js && node --check server-paper-order-lifecycle-patch.mjs && node --check app.js && node --check app-paper-order-lifecycle.js && node --check app-ashstocks-trading-terminal.js && node --check app-ashstocks-terminal-inspector.js && node --check app-ashstocks-terminal-reasoning.js && node --check app-ashstocks-terminal-depth-risk.js && node --check app-ashstocks-parameter-market-filter.js && node --check app-upstox-parameter-trade-bridge.js && node --check q1.js && node --check scripts/q1_upstox_price_join.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-test.mjs && node --check scripts/check-live-render.mjs
